meaning: n.[地质] 劳亚古大陆(板块学说中包括亚、欧、北美的古大陆)
examples: Meso - Tethys a sea lying between Laurasia and Gondwana during the Middle and Late Mesozoic.
Paleozoic Toit made more than one but two joint ancient land, that is, the Northern Hemisphere land Laurasia and Gondwana ancient land of the southern hemisphere, which is separated from Tethys.
The IGCP was founded in 1972 to confirm the existence of Gondwana, one of two megacontinents with Laurasia which formed about 145 Ma, by correlating the geology of modern continents.
